description: You are a supply chain analyst estimating the total demand for cancer drugs (ATC2 = 'L01') to ensure supply continuity. Using the historical data in the `tsibble::PBS` dataset and the `fpp3` library in R, forecast the total monthly script volume for these agents in Australia for the next 3 years (36 months). Your analysis should include an STL decomposition saved to /home/ga/RProjects/output/l01_decomposition.png. Compare ETS and ARIMA models based on AICc, saving the accuracy table to /home/ga/RProjects/output/l01_model_accuracy.csv. Generate a 36-month forecast using the best-fitting model, saving the forecast values (including Month, .mean, and prediction intervals) to /home/ga/RProjects/output/l01_forecast_values.csv and a visualization of the history and forecast to /home/ga/RProjects/output/l01_forecast_plot.png. All code must be written in /home/ga/RProjects/forecast_analysis.R.
